name: Ubuntu
postCreateCommand: (curl -sfS https://dotenvx.sh | sudo sh); sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y sshpass age zoxide fzf bat exa ripgrep fd-find;  echo >> ~/.bashrc; echo 'eval "$(zoxide init bash)"' >> ~/.bashrc; echo 'alias bat="batcat"' >> ~/.bashrc; echo 'alias ls="exa --group-directories-first"' >> ~/.bashrc; echo 'alias fd="fdfind"' >> ~/.bashrc
